crawled_urls.description: Homepage: name, tagline, record counts, funder statement.
About page: mission, contact, staff, funder grants, disclaimer.
Info page: full description, license statements, all references/citations.
Download page: file URLs, sizes, update dates, MD5 links.
REST API page: endpoint names, parameters, example URLs.
FAQ page: how-to guidance, confirms public access.
Partial download of all-data TSV ZIP: extracted 112-column header row.
Partial download of All 2D SDF ZIP: extracted SDF property names from first record.
MD5 checksum for all-data TSV ZIP.
UniProt mapping file: confirmed header row and full-file MD5.
CID mapping file: confirmed tab-separated no-header format and full-file MD5.
SID mapping file: confirmed format and MD5.
DrugBank mapping file: confirmed format and MD5.
PubMed IDs file: confirmed single-column format and MD5.
Target FASTA file: confirmed FASTA format and full-file MD5.

claims.notes: Page title and heading on homepage.

claims.value: BindingDB is a public, web-accessible database of measured binding affinities...
claims.notes: Direct quote of opening paragraph from info.jsp.
Canonical URL after redirect from https://www.bindingdb.org/.
Linked from homepage and info page: 'BindingDB is a FAIRsharing resource.'
File naming convention on download page uses YYYYMM suffix.

Direct quote from info.jsp: 'All data curated by BindingDB staff are provided under the Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.' Link href confirmed as https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/us/.

claims.value: All data curated by BindingDB staff are provided under the Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License. Data imported from ChEMBL are provided under their Creative Commons Attribution-Share Alike 3.0 Unported License.
claims.notes: Direct quote combining both license sentences from info.jsp.
No login required for browsing or downloading.
Download page states: 'These files updated when new data are added, usually monthly.'
Most recent update date of main data files on download page.

claims.value: Liu,T., Hwang, L., Burley,S.K., Nitsche,C.I., Southan,C., Walters,W.P., and Gilson,M.K. BindingDB in 2024: a FAIR knowledgebase of protein-small molecule binding data Nucleic Acids Research 53:D1633-D1644 (2025).
claims.notes: First reference in References section of info.jsp (most recent publication). Trailing [pdf] stripped.

claims.value: Skaggs School of Pharmacy and Pharmaceutical Sciences, University of California San Diego
claims.notes: About page: 'Skaggs School of Pharmacy & Pharmaceutical Sciences, 9500 Gilman Drive, MC 0751, La Jolla, California, 92093-0751'. Homepage links to https://pharmacy.ucsd.edu/ and https://ucsd.edu/.

claims.value: National Institute of General Medical Sciences, National Institutes of Health
claims.notes: About page: 'This project is supported by NIH grant R24GM144232'. Homepage: 'supported by NIH National Institute of General Medical Sciences (GM070064)'.
About page Staff Directory: 'PI: Michael K. Gilson, Ph.D., M.D. Email: mgilson@health.ucsd.edu'
REST API documented at BindingDBRESTfulAPI.jsp.

unverified_or_inferred.note: No explicit launch date found on any crawled page. Omitted.
Data spans from 1965 per curation table on homepage but not stated as an explicit temporalCoverage. Omitted.
No header row in BindingDB_CID.txt. Columns (BindingDB MonomerID, PubChem CID) inferred from download page description. No RecordSet defined.
No header row in BindingDB_SID.txt. Columns inferred from description. No RecordSet defined.
No header row in BindingDB_DrugBankID.txt. Columns inferred from description. No RecordSet defined.
No header row in BindingDB_PubMed.txt. Single PubMed ID column inferred from description. No RecordSet defined.
